name: Lobster Salad with Curried Mango Dressing
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces haricots verts, cut in half
1 1/4 pounds cooked lobster tail meat, sliced into medallions
16 yellow baby plum tomatoes, or cherry tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first five ingredients in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Stir in chives and shallots. Season to taste with salt and white pepper.
3. The dressing can be prepared up to one day in advance. Cover and refrigerate.
4. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Add haricots verts and cook until tender, about 4 minutes.
5. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the beans to a bowl of cold water. Drain.
6. Repeat the process with asparagus. Cut the asparagus, beans, bell pepper, greens, and cilantro into the large bowl.
7. Drizzle some dressing over the salad and toss lightly. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
8. Arrange the salad on plates. Fan the lobster decoratively.
9. Garnish with tomatoes and drizzle remaining dressing over.
